decisions.title: Three-layer staleness signal
decisions.summary: Badge + muted colors + timestamp for stale account indication

decisions.title: Conditional accordion layout
decisions.summary: DisclosureGroup accordion for multi-account, pixel-identical for single

decisions.title: Dynamic popover sizing
decisions.summary: Fixed 280pt width, variable height with explicit NSPopover.contentSize management

decisions.title: Color threshold alignment
decisions.summary: Resolved to match existing code: green <70%, orange 70-89%, red >=90%
